DEPARTMENT #7 COMMISSIONER SUE KAPLAN. D. CARTER, CLERK. SONIA WONG, CSR. PARTIES PRESENT: FRANK MYERS, PLAINTIFF. ARNOLD W. EVJE II, ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF. ABSENT WERE DEFENDANTS TONY HAWTHORNE AND DEFENDANT TERRY CORBIA, SUED HEREIN AS DOE 1 WHOSE DEFAULT WAS ENTERED ON 8/27/97. 9:25 A.M. C/C FOR UNCONTESTED COURT TRIAL. PLTF'S. WITNESSES, S/E. PLTF'S EXHIBIT, I.D./EVID. THE COURT AFTER HEARING THE TESTIMONY AND REVIEWING THE EXHIBIT ORDERED JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF FRANK MYERS AGAINST DEFENDANT TONY HAWTHORNE AND TERRY CORBIA FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISE LOCATED AT 205 NINTH STREET APARTMENT #22, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. TOGETHER WITH $1,000.00 PAST DUE RENT AND $1,880. UNLAWFUL DETAINER DAMAGES TOTALING $2,880.00 PRINCIPAL TOGETHER WITH COST PER COST BILL AND A PER DIEM HOLD OVER OF $20.00.
